description: We had a great time putting on our first reaper challenge tonight. She started out strong but in the end couldn’t handle the 🌶️. Thank you for joining us Crispy Pare you did a great job 😊 Think you have what it takes to complete this fiery challenge? Message us for details if you want to give it a shot!!

layoutDescription: Editorial magazine: oversized display headline, narrow reading measure (640px), photo band breaks between sections, pull-quote or stat strip mid-page.
mood: Warm, appetizing, neighborhood favorite — invite hunger and comfort
antiPatterns: No fake Google star widgets unless review_score provided. No SaaS feature grids. Food sites should feel sensory (texture, warmth, appetite), not corporate.
photoInventory: You will receive 12 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
